entry.value: SELECT o.OrderID, c.CustomerID, c.CustomerName, c.City, p.ProductID, p.ProductName, p.Category, o.Quantity, p.Price, (o.Quantity * p.Price) AS TotalAmount, o.OrderDate FROM Orders o INNER JOIN Customers c ON o.CustomerID = c.CustomerID INNER JOIN Products p ON o.ProductID = p.ProductID;
SELECT *FROM FLOWFILE WHERE CustomerID IS NOT NULL AND CustomerName IS NOT NULL AND Age > 0
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE WHERE CustomerID IS NOT NULL AND Quantity > 0
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE WHERE ProductID IS NOT NULL AND Price > 0
